# MDE v1.5.12

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed `mde /path/to/file.md` launch behavior so Markdown files inside remembered workspaces open that workspace first, then locate the file in Explorer.
- Added fallback workspace detection for command-line Markdown files under Git projects by walking up to the nearest parent `.git` directory before falling back to standalone-file mode.
- Applied the same workspace-aware Markdown file selection logic to the Open Markdown File action.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for remembered-workspace Markdown launches, Git parent workspace fallback, renderer IPC candidate roots, and workspace file loading.
- Linked the project auto-pick and release workflow skills into `.codex/skills/` for Codex skill discovery.
- Increased E2E build setup timeout for the desktop and editor performance suites so slower production renderer builds can complete instead of timing out before tests run.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese quick-start manual with the new command-line Markdown workspace resolution behavior.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions will build and publish macOS and Windows desktop artifacts for this release.
